welcome_offer.description: Earn up to 60,000 World of Hyatt bonus points: 30,000 bonus points after spending $3,000 in the first 3 months from account opening, plus up to 30,000 more bonus points by earning 2 bonus points per $1 on purchases that normally earn 1 point per $1, on up to $15,000 spent in the first 6 months.
notes: Issuer and secondary sources describe this as an up-to-60k tiered offer; only the first 30k is a direct bonus after $3,000/3mo, while the additional 30k comes from temporary extra earning on up to $15,000 spend.

welcome_offer: sources/*issuer-chase*.md:30,000 Bonus Points after you spend $3,000

open_questions: Confirm the additional up-to-30k component is represented as temporary extra earning, not a guaranteed lump-sum bonus.

community.summary: Current issuer and secondary sources support the World of Hyatt personal card public up-to-60k tiered offer.

observations.excerpt: Chase page describes up to 60k: 30k after $3k/3mo plus up to 30k more via bonus earning on up to $15k spend.
TPG tracks the personal Hyatt card as an up-to-60k offer with the second 30k tied to additional spending/earning.
